title: Bots have now passed human traffic online, Cloudflare boss laments says agentic traffic wasn t expected to eclipse real people until next year
summary: Bots have surpassed human traffic online for the first time, said Cloudflare's CEO Matthew Prince, citing a rapid increase in agentic internet traffic.
insight: Agentic bots' unexpected growth undermines online trust and authenticity.

title: AMD's Helios MI455X AI platform breaks cover, initial systems use UALink-over-Ethernet interconnects AMD's Vera Rubin rival surfaces, but the downsides of Ethernet could hamstring performance
summary: AMD's Helios MI455X AI platform competes with Nvidia's NVL72, but may be hampered by Ethernet interconnects.
insight: Ethernet interconnects could limit Helios performance in certain workloads initially.

title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman admits AI token costs are becoming 'a huge issue' company seeks improved value as overspending becomes a meme
summary: OpenAI's clients are complaining about excessive AI spending, prompting CEO Sam Altman to address the issue.
insight: Excessive AI costs threaten clients' annual budgets and overall financial stability tightly.

title: Production of DDR4 memory and motherboards is restarting amid unprecedented memory shortages PC industry preparing for a world without DDR5
summary: DDR4 memory and motherboard production is restarting due to unprecedented shortages, signaling a shift back to older technology. This move is a response to DDR5's high cost and limited availability, affecting the PC industry's supply chain. Manufacturers are preparing for a potential future without DDR5.
insight: Industry pivots to DDR4 due to DDR5 cost and supply constraints.

title: $559 Nvidia RTX 5070 GPU deal is the cheapest model available 1440p high-performance gaming at just $10 above MSRP
summary: Lenovo offers a discounted $559 Nvidia RTX 5070 GPU, $80 off MSRP.
insight: Cheapest RTX 5070 GPU available for 1440p gaming with performance.

title: HP has slashed an astonishing $2,600 off this RTX 5080 gaming PC, nearly 50% off get an epic Omen 35L rig with a 9900X3D, 64GB DDR5, and 4TB of SSD storage for just $2,899.99
summary: Save $2,600 on an HP Omen 45L gaming PC, featuring a 9900X3D, RTX 5080, 64GB of DDR5 RAM, and 4TB in SSD storage, now available for $2,899.99.
insight: Deeply discounted top-tier gaming PC offers exceptional value for buyers.

title: Frore shows off LiquidJet Nexus coldplate for Nvidia Vera Rubin, other AI accelerators offers up claimed 10% token generation boost over rival liquid-cooling solutions
summary: Frore's LiquidJet Nexus coldplate boosts token generation by 10% on Nvidia Vera Rubin
insight: AI accelerator efficiency gains through innovative liquid cooling solutions matter

title: Microsoft CEO says new AI data centers use as little water annually as a restaurant closed-loop cooling system aims to slash consumption from millions of gallons as AI infrastructure faces mounting environmental scrutiny
summary: Microsoft's new AI data centers use as little water as a restaurant annually, thanks to a closed-loop cooling system, aiming to reduce consumption significantly.
insight: Reducing AI infrastructure water consumption has significant environmental implications.

title: Surface Laptop Ultra targets 110W TDP for RTX Spark Superchip Microsoft reveals power budget of its high-end 15" system in hands-on session
summary: Microsoft's Surface Laptop Ultra with RTX Spark Superchip targets 110W TDP, suggesting a thermal and power ballpark for other similarly-sized systems.
insight: Power budget for high-end laptops revealed for the first time publicly.

title: Tom's Hardware Unfiltered: Computex 2026, Day 3 the heat bites as our team races across Taipei
summary: Our team in Taipei is working through a sweltering Computex 2026, navigating crowded exhibition halls and multiple high-profile announcements. With the show busier than ever, our team is racing to deliver in-depth coverage of the latest tech trends and products. From AI-powered innovations to cutting-edge hardware, every moment counts.
insight: Rapid innovation fuels intense competition in the tech industry landscape.

title: Aviation enthusiast uses Raspberry Pi and ABS-B radio to create viral real-time airport tracker open-source 'Skylight' intercepts aircraft signals and projects flight paths onto your ceiling
summary: Cameron Paczek's Skylight project uses RTL-SDR radio and Raspberry Pi to display real-time ADS-B signals from aircraft, projecting flight paths onto a ceiling with a projector.
insight: Real-time airport tracking technology is now accessible and affordable for enthusiasts.

title: TeamGroup shows off external SSD with wireless self-destruct function T-Create Expert P35SG External SSD can be wiped with a single text message
summary: TeamGroup released a T-Create Expert P35SG External SSD with a unique feature: it can be wiped with a single text message, demonstrating a focus on security.
insight: Security through remote data destruction offers peace of mind.

title: MSI Claw 8 EX AI+ brings Intel Arc G3 Extreme to handhelds 8-inch, 120 Hz display and new ergonomic grips
summary: MSI's Claw 8 EX AI+ features an 8-inch 120 Hz display, Intel Arc G3 Extreme, and ergonomic grips.
insight: Enhanced gaming performance in a handheld console design

title: Save $1,280 on this 4K-ready Alienware Aurora desktop PC with RTX 5080 high-performance gaming at your fingertips for $2,919
summary: Save $1,280 on the Dell Alienware Aurora gaming PC with RTX 5080 graphics card
insight: Unlock high-performance gaming at an affordable price point

title: Lian Li's Edge Platinum V2 PSUs have an LED dust indicator, magnetic filter, and a snap-on fan and USB header hub Edge line's trademark 90-degree power connector also returns
summary: Lian Li's Edge Platinum V2 PSUs introduce a dust-detecting LED and snap-on features. They also return the 90-degree power connector and include a removable filter. The PSUs are expected to arrive in September.
insight: Upgraded PSUs enhance user experience and efficiency with convenience features.

title: ASRock shows off a slew of new AIOs, Power Supplies, and 10th Anniversary hardware a monster 3KW Taichi power supply for AI and hybrid Taichi Aqua AIO/custom loop stand out in the crowd
summary: ASRock showcased new AIOs, Power Supplies, and 10th Anniversary hardware at Computex, including a 3KW Taichi power supply.
insight: ASRock pushes boundaries with high-wattage power supplies for AI and gaming.

title: Samsung shows first HBM5 mockup with Heat Path Block cooling thermal race with SK hynix shaping up
summary: Samsung unveiled its first HBM5 mockup at Computex 2026, featuring in-package cooling. This marks a milestone in the development of high-bandwidth memory. The new cooling structure is designed to combat thermal issues.
insight: Advancing memory tech with in-package cooling boosts performance and efficiency.

title: Computex 2026 Day Two Wrap-Up: Intel atones for Arrow Lake, Wi-Fi 8 comes into focus
summary: Intel made amends for Arrow Lake delays at Computex 2026, showcasing advancements in Wi-Fi 8 technology. The company's efforts to improve Wi-Fi 8 capabilities are gaining momentum. Industry stakeholders are now focusing on the potential benefits of this upgraded standard.
insight: Upgraded Wi-Fi 8 technology poised to revolutionize connectivity standards.

title: Corsair launches lightweight budget-friendly HS35 v3 gaming headsets wired version weighs a cool 230 grams
summary: Corsair released the HS35 v3 gaming headsets, available in wired and wireless versions, at Computex 2026. The wired version of the headset weighs 230 grams, making it a lightweight option for gamers. This new headset offers a budget-friendly gaming experience.
insight: Lightweight gaming headsets cater to gamers seeking comfort and portability.

title: Noctua shows off improved thermosiphon prototype passively circulated liquid cooler gets Q3 2027 projected launch date
summary: Noctua showcased an improved thermosiphon liquid cooler at Computex 2026, with a Q3 2027 launch date set. The refined design features an enhanced evaporator for better performance. This marks a significant step in passive liquid cooling technology.
insight: Breakthrough in passive liquid cooling technology for quieter systems

title: Samsung rolls out 2026 Odyssey gaming monitors, including 5K and 6K models 27 to 32 inches with up to 330 Hz refresh rate
summary: Samsung has released the 2026 Odyssey gaming monitors with high refresh rates and resolutions. The line includes 27 to 32-inch models featuring 5K and 6K IPS panels. The Odyssey G8 has a 32-inch 6K IPS panel.
insight: Samsung boosts gaming performance with high-resolution and high-refresh-rate monitors

title: AMD executives react to Nvidia s RTX Spark you re just wrong if you don t get a Strix Halo notebook
summary: AMD responds to Nvidia's RTX Spark with confidence in its Strix Halo and Gorgon Halo products. AMD believes its products will be superior to Nvidia's offerings. This marks a competitive move in the graphics market.
insight: AMD asserts its competitive edge in high-end gaming notebooks.

title: NZXT showcases H6 mid-tower chassis, new Ultra RGB fans, and a white H2 offering boundless RGB customization options take this case to a whole new level
summary: NZXT showcased their H6 mid-tower chassis, Ultra RGB fans, and H2 case at Computex 2026, offering enhanced customization options.
insight: Seamless RGB integration for immersive PC experiences

title: Convert old IR remote controls into presentation clickers using an RP2040 USB board and open-source TTVKTR firmware
summary: Convert old IR remote controls into presentation clickers using an RP2040 USB board and the open-source TTVKTR firmware, reducing electronics waste and repurposing old devices.
insight: Reducing electronics waste through creative repurposing of old devices matters.

title: Forlinx launches Rockchip RK3572 system-on-module (SoM) and development board with Linux 6.12 BSP
summary: Forlinx has launched a Rockchip RK3572 system-on-module (SoM) and development board with Linux 6.12 BSP, targeting HMI applications that leverage Edge AI. The SoC features an octa-core Cortex-A73/A53 processor, 4 TOPS NPU, and Arm Mali-G310V2 GPU. This launch aims to support consumer electronics, industrial control, and edge computing applications.
insight: Bringing Edge AI capabilities to mid-range HMI applications

title: Avalue EPC-WCL fanless Edge AI mini PC features Intel Core Series 3 Wildcat Lake processor
summary: The Avalue EPC-WCL is a fanless Edge AI mini PC powered by the Intel Core Series 3 Wildcat Lake processor, offering up to 40 TOPS of AI performance and supporting tasks like real-time inference and vision processing. It features up to 48GB DDR5 memory, M.2 expansion, and multiple display outputs. The device also supports Wi-Fi 7, 4G LTE/5G, and 45W Power Delivery via USB Type-C.
insight: Edge AI mini PC for real-time inference and vision processing capabilities.

title: ModRetro M64 An AMD Artix UltraScale+ FPGA based open-source Nintendo 64-compatible console with original cartridge support
summary: The ModRetro M64 is an open-source Nintendo 64-compatible console powered by an AMD Artix UltraScale+ FPGA, supporting original cartridges and modern connectivity features.
insight: Advances retro gaming with accurate, responsive, and scalable hardware-level emulation technology.

title: AMD CPUs hit another Steam survey record as Intel gap shrinks to all-time low
summary: AMD CPUs set a new Steam survey record with 44.9% market share, closing the gap with Intel to under 10%.
insight: AMD gains significant ground in CPU market share competition.

title: Your DisplayPort 2.1 Monitor Might Not Be Running DisplayPort 2.1
summary: DisplayPort 2.1 monitors may not run at full UHBR20 speed due to cable limitations, requiring specific cables to unlock the true capabilities.
insight: Cable choice limits DisplayPort 2.1 performance significantly.

title: Microsoft built a wearable AI badge with a camera and fingerprint sensor
summary: Microsoft introduced wearable AI badges with cameras and fingerprint sensors for easy AI access.
insight: Streamlined AI interaction can boost productivity and work efficiency.

title: FanControl is a powerful Windows utility for advanced cooling management
summary: FanControl is a powerful Windows utility for advanced cooling management, offering detailed fan curves and temperature monitoring.
insight: Optimized cooling boosts PC performance and prolongs component lifespan.

title: Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis devs confirm AI use, but promise final game will be fully human-crafted
summary: Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis brings Lara Croft's classic attire to modern platforms with reimagined puzzles and visually upgraded locations. The game is a remake of the classic series, combining nostalgic elements with modern features. It will be available on PlayStation.
insight: Human-crafted gameplay, no AI-driven content in the final game.

title: Microsoft unveils Majorana 2, a lead-based quantum chip designed with AI
summary: Microsoft introduces Majorana 2, a lead-based quantum chip utilizing AI in design.
insight: Microsoft's lead-based design may offer a more robust quantum computing solution.

title: Microsoft took OpenClaw, wrapped it in enterprise security, and called it Scout
summary: Microsoft has introduced Scout, a personal AI agent within Microsoft 365. Scout is designed to provide a new category of agents called Autopilots, enhancing productivity. It's built on OpenClaw technology with added enterprise security.
insight: Microsoft enhances productivity with AI-powered personal agent, Scout.

title: Phison's next-gen PCIe 6.0 SSD controller hits 28 GB/s, and it's doing it at just 7 watts
summary: Phison's next-gen PCIe 6.0 SSD controller, X3, promises twice the throughput of current high-end PCIe 5.0 SSDs. It achieves 28 GB/s sequential speeds using a PCIe 6.0 x4 interface while consuming only 7 watts of power.
insight: Phison's X3 controller optimizes performance and efficiency simultaneously.

title: Microsoft Surface RTX Spark Dev Box packs 128GB unified memory and Nvidia's new Arm chip for local AI
summary: Microsoft's Surface RTX Spark Dev Box features a 100-watt thermal envelope and 128GB unified memory, powered by Nvidia's new Arm chip. The device's design resembles an Xbox Series X and includes an aluminum casing that acts as a heatsink. This powerful system is ideal for local AI development.
insight: Nvidia's Arm chip boosts local AI capabilities on Microsoft Surface RTX.

title: Google is offering Android developers cash in exchange for code to train AI
summary: Google is offering Android developers cash for their code to train AI coding tools.
insight: Google's AI training initiative could democratize access to coding expertise globally.

title: GitHub just switched Copilot to metered billing, and developers are watching months of credits vanish in a single day
summary: GitHub switched Copilot to metered billing, causing users to lose credits. The change moved from a pool-based system to a usage-based system, billing users based on actual AI consumption in tokens. This switch affected all plans starting June 1.
insight: Users face sudden, significant losses in unused Copilot credits.

title: Cherry XTRFY launches the world's first 8K ultra-wideband gaming keyboard
summary: Cherry XTRFY introduces the world's first 8K ultra-wideband gaming keyboard, the K63W Pro, with an 8,000Hz polling rate in both wired and wireless modes, providing lower input latency.
insight: Industry-leading polling rate for ultra-responsive gaming keyboard experience

title: Fans say StarCraft II's first major patch in nearly 6 years is "essentially a new game"
summary: StarCraft II's first major patch in nearly 6 years brings significant balance changes, updating unit costs and abilities for all three playable races.
insight: Massive update breathes new life into an aging real-time strategy game.

title: The world's largest private laser just fired up in race to make fusion power real
summary: The world's largest private laser, Phoenix, has powered up to achieve fusion. Located inside a 74,000-square-foot facility, it utilizes a krypton fluoride excimer laser. This technology has roots in semiconductor manufacturing.
insight: Advancements in laser technology could revolutionize fusion energy production.
